ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regattas" (
  "regatta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regatta */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the regatta */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the regatta */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the regatta */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the regatta */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organizing entity */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the regatta's official website */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data tracking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the regatta was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regatta_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleets" (
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fleet */,
  "regatta_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regatta the fleet is participating in */,
  "fleet_name" TEXT /* Name of the fleet (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the fleet belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the fleet was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fleet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fleets_regatta_id FOREIGN KEY ("regatta_id") REFERENCES regattas ("regatta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fleets_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boats" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat */,
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fleet the boat is participating in */,
  "boat_name" TEXT /* Name of the boat (e.g., Mongoose) */,
  "sail_number" INTEGER /* Sail number of the boat */,
  "helm_name" TEXT /* Name of the helm (e.g., Eric Hansen) */,
  "phrf_tot" REAL /* Performance Handicap Rating (PHRF) total */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the boat belongs to */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the boat owner */,
  "owner_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the boat owner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the boat was registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boats_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boats_fleet_id FOREIGN KEY ("fleet_id") REFERENCES fleets ("fleet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., IMX 38, Melges 24) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "min_length" REAL /* Minimum length of boats in the class */,
  "max_length" REAL /* Maximum length of boats in the class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "regatta_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regatta the race is part of */,
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fleet participating in the race */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the race */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the race */,
  "race_number" INTEGER /* Sequential number of the race within the regatta */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind during the race */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Speed of the wind during the race */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the race was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_fleet_id FOREIGN KEY ("fleet_id") REFERENCES fleets ("fleet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_regatta_id FOREIGN KEY ("regatta_id") REFERENCES regattas ("regatta_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race the result is for */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat the result is for */,
  "elapsed_time" TEXT /* Elapsed time for the boat */,
  "corrected_time" TEXT /* Corrected time for the boat */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded to the boat */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the boat */,
  "finish_position" INTEGER /* Finishing position of the boat */,
  "penalties" TEXT /* Any penalties applied to the boat */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, sailor, spectator) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, sailor, spectator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission is for */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
